name: BWX Technologies, Inc.
summary: PART I General BWX Technologies, Inc. is a specialty manufacturer of nuclear components, a developer of nuclear technologies and a service provider with an operating history of more than 100 years. Our core businesses focus on the design, engineering and manufacture of precision naval nuclear components, nuclear reactors and nuclear fuel for the U.S. Government.
